parameters.query:
SELECT l.id, l.first_name, l.last_name, l.email, l.phone, l.source, l.status, l.lead_score, l.tags, l.created_at
FROM leads l
WHERE l.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
LIMIT 100

INSERT INTO leads (first_name, last_name, email, phone, source, status, lead_score, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, COALESCE($5, 'web'), 'new', 0, NOW(), NOW())
RETURNING id, first_name, phone
